scripts.backend:run: cd backend && source ../.venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || true && uvicorn api.server:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.backend:init-cpp: cd backend/cpp-sim && mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. && cmake --build .
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && python -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || true && pip install -U pip && pip install fastapi uvicorn
